summary: Researched all components needed to implement DefNextOperator and DefPrevOperator. Found that both are straightforward 1-arity DefinedOperator subclasses where Next(φ)=U(φ,⊥) maps to derived_definition returning [UntilOperator, argument, [BotOperator]] and Prev(φ)=S(φ,⊥) maps to [SinceOperator, argument, [BotOperator]]. Templates: DefFutureOperator/DefPastOperator (lines 1479-1529 in operators.py). Registration: append to bimodal_operators collection. print_method: identical pattern to DefFutureOperator using print_over_times with world history times.
